state.title: merge-to-main.sh PATH resolution gap: venv not guaranteed in PATH when git merge triggers pre-commit hooks
state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Pre-existing finding from main (merge commit review). merge-to-main.sh _phase_sync replaced worktree-sync-from-main.sh with bare git fetch+merge, losing pre-commit PATH resolution for the auto-commit during merge. git merge --no-edit triggers pre-commit hooks, and if the venv is not activated, pre-commit may not be in PATH. The simplification is architecturally sound but creates a latent failure mode in non-standard environments. File: plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
